headline: The freshest food you can get without visiting the farm yourself.
subhead: 100% regenerative. From named NSW farms. At your nearest hub in 2-3 days.
hero_copy:
Supermarket beef sits in cold storage for 14-21 days before it reaches the shelf. It travels an average of 2,400km. By the time you cook it, the farm is a distant memory.

FarmThru food goes from paddock to pick-up in 2-3 days. You collect from your nearest hub. That's the difference a shorter supply chain makes.

sections.heading: Taste you can actually trace
sections.body:
Every product on FarmThru comes from a named farm. 100% grass-fed beef from Rachel's Farm in Kempsey. Heritage Berkshire pork from Bundarra Berkshires. Wild-caught salmon from Collins Wild Caught on the South Coast. Eggs from Farmer Brown.

No hormones. No antibiotics. No feedlot finishing. Pasture-raised animals on regenerative land. This is food the way it's supposed to taste.

sections.heading: How the hub model keeps it fresh
sections.body:
FarmThru operates a hub-and-collect model. You order online from 50+ farms. Your order goes straight from the farm to the hub. You collect when it's ready.

Zero warehouses. Zero wholesalers. Fewer steps means fresher food and a fairer price for the farmer who grew it. It's not a subscription box. It's a grocery store built around quality.

sections.heading: What 2,000+ families already know
sections.body:
"My kids can taste the difference. And I love knowing the farmers are getting a fair price." - James, Northern Beaches

"Finally, a grocery delivery that actually cares about where the food comes from. The quality is incredible." - Sarah, Sydney

FarmThru is opening an equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal in July 2026. Join the waitlist for first access.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero image: close-up of beautifully marbled grass-fed steak on a timber board, natural light, no styling. Below-fold: side-by-side supply chain comparison (supermarket 2,400km vs FarmThru direct). Farm partner portraits with their products. Hub collection photo. Let the food be the hero.
